title: EPC import reference catalog — OtthonNet / telecom product domain
description: Imported and normalized EPC reference catalog based on the attached product offering, product specification and product inventory exports. It keeps specification, offering, inventory, characteristic, service and resource concerns separated for universal UPC modeling.
